title: Water of Youth
description:
Make your pets never age with this DataPack.

You can turn entities into baby or adult form at will.
body:
Make your pets never ages with this DataPack.
You can turn entities into baby or adult form at will.

Craft the new _**Potion of Youth**_ or _**Potion of Age**_ and throw it to an entity in order to make it a baby again or an adult instantly.

Entities sprayed with the _Potion of Youth_ will **remain** in its **baby** form (won't age) until a _Potion of Age_ is used on them.

---

**BETA:** The recipes are prototypes, I would like to know your opinions and suggestions.
